economic_notes: Pabineau First Nation operates Seafood Market and Takeout, Pabineau Gas Bar and Tobacco Shop, and Pabineau Trucking as band-owned enterprises. Also holds a 51% ownership stake in Oinpegitjoig Wind GP Ltd. (limited partnership with Natural Forces NB Inc., formed February 22, 2018).
notes: Consolidated entity includes Pabineau Seafood Market and Takeout, Pabineau Gas Bar and Tobacco Shop, and Pabineau Trucking. Oinpegitjoig Wind GP Ltd. (51% owned) is accounted for using the modified equity method (not fully consolidated). Long-term debt is a 0% emergency loan from Ulnooweg Development Group with $20,000 forgivable portion. Expenses total calculated as 9,070,125 operating + 559,980 amortization = 9,630,105. Prior year expenses: 9,932,676 + 604,142 = 10,536,818. Total government transfers: ISC $2,726,055 + Health Canada $557,655 + DFO $603,257 = $3,886,967. OSR = $12,234,532 - $3,886,967 = $8,347,565. Accumulated surplus on balance sheet shows $21,171,976 vs $21,171,973 on income statement (minor rounding difference).
